ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the listing */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the vehicle is located */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the vehicle */,
  "fuel" TEXT /* Type of fuel the vehicle uses */,
  "odometer" INTEGER /* Odometer reading of the vehicle */,
  "title_status" TEXT /* Title status of the vehicle */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission in the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "drive" TEXT /* Drive type of the vehicle */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size category of the vehicle */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., coupe, sedan, SUV) */,
  "paint_color" TEXT /* Paint color of the vehicle */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the vehicle image */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the vehicle's location */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude of the vehicle's location */,
  "county_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the county where the vehicle is located */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county where the vehicle is located */,
  "state_fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the state where the vehicle is located */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code where the vehicle is located */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state where the vehicle is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the vehicle */,
  "features" TEXT /* Additional features of the vehicle */,
  "warranty_info" TEXT /* Information about the vehicle's warranty */,
  "inspection_report_url" TEXT /* URL to the vehicle's inspection report */,
  "listed_by" TEXT /* Type of seller (e.g., dealership, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., seller, buyer, admin) */,
  "favorites" TEXT /* List of vehicle IDs that the user has favorited */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealerships" (
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dealership */,
  "dealer_name" TEXT /* Name of the dealership */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the dealership */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the dealership */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the dealership */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the dealership is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the dealership is located */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the dealership */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the dealership's website */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the dealership */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the dealership based on user reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dealer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the image is associated with */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the event is associated with */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle sold */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" INTEGER /* Price at which the vehicle was sold */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the sale */,
  "finance_option" TEXT /* Financing options available for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather update */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the weather data is associated with */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the vehicle's location */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Weather condition at the vehicle's location */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time when the weather data was last updated */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level at the vehicle's location */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the vehicle's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who favorited the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle that was favorited */,
  "favorited_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was favorited */,
  "notes" TEXT /* User's notes about the favorited vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "dealer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., sales, inventory) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data contained within the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query string */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the search was performed */,
  "search_results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned by the search */,
  "search_filters" TEXT /* Filters applied in the search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id")
)
